title: Innovative Business Pitch
scenario: Create a business pitch for a startup that offers a subscription-based meal delivery service for busy professionals. The pitch should highlight the convenience, quality, and customization options of the service. The tone should be professional and persuasive. Use specific numbers and statistics to demonstrate the market potential and competitive advantage. The pitch should be at least 100 words but no more than 200 words.
constraints: Must use specific numbers and statistics to demonstrate market potential
Must highlight the convenience, quality, and customization options of the service
Must be at least 100 words but no more than 200 words

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the pitch demonstrate a clear understanding of the market potential?
Does the pitch meet the specified constraints (word count and tone)?
Does the pitch convey a professional and persuasive tone?
